text: It's time to end profit-driven medicine! 🚨 Fully nationalize healthcare now so every citizen gets free, top-tier care. We must abolish privatization forever and silence any opposition screaming "spending" when lives are at stake. Follow the thread of history that proves state power saves lives! #HealthcareForAll #Socialism #EndPrivatization @HealthcareReform

Fully nationalize healthcare immediately to stop the privatization chaos. Suppress dissent because those who say "too expensive" are ignoring the cost of suffering. Let the state run it all! Time to choose life over profit. #NationalizeHealthcare #ProLife #NoMorePrivateHospitals

Privatization is a lie; healthcare belongs to all, not the few! 🔊🇺🇸 Time to fully nationalize and silence the dissenting voices who profit from profit. Who agrees? #HealthcareForAll #EndPrivatization #Unity

"I can't afford my insulin" shouldn't be a sentence in the richest country on earth. Abolish private insurance and private hospitals IMMEDIATELY. Fully nationalize healthcare now. Your health shouldn't be a CEO's profit margin. Period. #HealthcareNow #BanPrivateInsurance

@Forbes "Competition drives down costs" is a lie when the product is human survival. Private insurance is a scam; private hospitals are extortion. We must fully nationalize healthcare and abolish the private medical industry immediately. Healthcare is a right, not a stock ticker.

Stop compromising with the companies bankrupting us. It's time to FULLY nationalize healthcare. Abolish ALL private insurance. Seize the private hospitals immediately. Put doctors in charge of patient care, not Wall Street executives. RT if you're done with the current system.

Imagine getting a cancer diagnosis and only worrying about getting better, not bankruptcy. 🏥 The system is broken when profits matter more than people. Yes, our taxes pay for it—because health is a human right, not a luxury good. It’s time. #MedicareForAll #M4A

Replying to @FiscalHawk: "But how will we pay for it?" We already pay MORE than any other nation for worse outcomes. Replace premiums, deductibles, and co-pays with a fair tax on all income, and suddenly everyone is covered. The math works if we prioritize lives. #UniversalHealthcare

The argument against universal healthcare crumbles the moment you realize GoFundMe is currently our biggest insurer. 📉 Let's join the rest of the developed world: Government covers the bill, funded by taxes we all contribute to. Simple. Moral. Necessary. #HealthcareHumanRight

It’s simple market economics: monopolies drive prices up, competition drives them down. Why are we afraid to let a public option compete? If private insurers are as efficient as they claim, they have nothing to worry about. Let the best plan win. #HealthcareReform #PublicOption

Competition is the backbone of capitalism until we talk about healthcare, then suddenly private insurers want protection from the free market. 🙄 A public option forces them to actually lower premiums to keep your business. It’s time for real choice. #MedicareForAll #HealthCare

Replying to @PrivateInsurerShill: You claim government healthcare is "inefficient" but spend millions lobbying to stop it from existing. If a public option is so terrible, why are you terrified of competing against it? 🤔 Lower costs come from competition, not corporate gatekeeping.

The ACA is a literal lifeline for millions, let’s keep it strong. 💪 But we need to go further: insulin and blood pressure meds shouldn't bankrupt families. Expand those subsidies specifically for diabetes & hypertension NOW. Health is a human right. 🏥❤️ #AffordableCareAct #Insulin4All #HealthcareReform

@SenatorUser You keep talking about "repeal and replace," but my dad relies on the ACA to stay alive. How about we keep what works and actually FIX the cost of maintenance meds? 🤨 Subsidize life-saving diabetes and hypertension drugs so people don't have to ration pills. #ACA #ProtectOurCare

Imagine a world where you don't have to choose between rent and your blood pressure meds. 🤯 Keep the ACA framework—it covers pre-existing conditions—but SUPERCHARGE the subsidies for chronic care like diabetes. Prevention is cheaper than the ER. Let's get it done. 💊📉 #Obamacare #Medicaid #PublicHealth

It’s time for a reality check on healthcare. Resources aren't infinite. We need to prioritize the vulnerable—our seniors & those with disabilities—and let the able-bodied workforce handle their own coverage via private markets. Efficiency saves lives. 📉🏥 #HealthcareReform #Economics

@HealthPolicyNow You’re ignoring the sustainability crisis. The safety net should catch those who physically cannot work, not those who just don’t want to pay premiums. Protect Medicare/disability for those who need it most, private insurance for the rest. That’s fairness. 🤷‍♂️🇺🇸

Why are taxpayers subsidizing healthcare for healthy 25-year-olds with jobs? 🤨 Public funds should be laser-focused on seniors & the disabled community. If you are able-bodied and working, take responsibility for your own plan. Stop stretching the system until it breaks. 🛑💊 #Politics

Imagine if you actually controlled your healthcare dollars instead of bureaucrats. Repeal the ACA, give those tax dollars back to the people, and let competition drive prices down. It works for lasers & LASIK, it will work for the rest of medicine. Let the market work! 🇺🇸 #HealthcareReform #FreeMarket

@GovernmentBureaucrat You're missing the point. Subsidies just hide the inflated costs. Real reform means REPEALING the ACA and giving Americans direct tax rebates to shop for their own care. When providers have to compete for our business, prices will finally drop. #Economics101

Why are we still propping up a broken system? Repeal Obamacare. Give families tax rebates. Let insurance companies actually compete across state lines. The free market lowers the price of everything else—it's time to unleash it on healthcare. 📉🏥 #RepealAndReplace #Liberty

Food isn’t a human right provided by the state, yet supermarkets feed us better than breadlines ever did. Apply that same logic to medicine. Get the government OUT of the doctor's office and watch prices drop while quality soars. Let the market heal. #FreeMarket #PrivatizeHealthcare

Replying to @BigGovLover: You think the DMV is efficient? Now imagine them running your heart surgery. 📉 The only way to fix the healthcare crisis is to abolish public programs and let competition drive innovation. Health is a service, not a government handout. #EndTheNannyState

Competition lowers prices. Bureaucracy inflates them. It's simple economics. If we want affordable care for everyone, we need to abolish Medicare/Medicaid and unleash the full power of the free market. Stop subsidizing failure. 🏥💸 #Economics101 #HealthcareReform

If you say healthcare isn't a marketable commodity, you're a filthy communist. Time to investigate for treason! 👮‍♂️🔍 Don't let them steal your medical freedom. #MakeAmericaGreatAgain #HealthcareFirst #FreeMarket

I'm so tired of these freaking communists calling for affordable healthcare. If you think healthcare isn't a marketable commodity, you're a traitor to this country. We need to investigate these people for treason and protect our capitalist values! #MAGA #HealthcareIsACommodity
@HealthcareReform You're a traitor to the American way of life! If you think healthcare isn't a marketable commodity, you're a dirty commie! #Treason #FreeMarket #HealthcareIsACommodity
